Move suggestion popup ABOVE the input box instead of overlapping it

Add margin so it never blocks typing area

Limit max width and height

Add scroll if content overflows

Reduce UI intrusiveness:

Make popup slightly transparent

Auto-hide after 5 seconds

Add close (X) button

Ensure it does NOT cover input field at any time

Improve UX feedback:

Show "Analyzing..." indicator during debounce delay

Replace it with result once evaluation completes

Ensure clean behavior:

Only one popup at a time (remove previous before showing new)

Do not spam multiple results for incremental typing

Files to modify:

content.js (debounce + logic)

content.css or injected styles (UI positioning)

End goal:

System should wait until user finishes typing

Show only one clean, non-intrusive suggestion

Never block or overlap the input field

Avoid repeated/similar evaluations

FIX SIMILARITY LOGIC (IMPORTANT)

REMOVE this rule completely:

Do NOT use: absolute length difference < 10

Reason:

Two completely different prompts can have same length → false duplicates

UPDATE similarity logic:

function isTooSimilar(a, b):

normalize both (lowercase, trim, collapse spaces)

if a === b → return true

if a startsWith b OR b startsWith a → return true ONLY if shorter string length > 20

compute similarity ratio using levenshtein:
similarity = 1 - (distance / max_length)

return true ONLY if similarity > 0.9

FINAL RULE:

Only skip when:
exact match
OR strong prefix match (long text only)
OR similarity > 0.9

EVALUATION CONTROL (NO SPAM)

Keep:

debounce = 3000ms

evaluation happens ONLY after full debounce pause

no evaluation while typing

skip if similar to lastEvaluatedNorm

skip if similar to lastStoredNorm

update lastEvaluatedNorm ONLY after API success

update lastStoredNorm ONLY if prompt_logged === true

CSS:

position: fixed

top: 80px (below browser toolbar area)

right: 20px

attach popup to textarea

overlap input box

stop dragging
